notes: This file maps the 17 servo IDs to mathematical walking roles.
IDs 1-8 are treated as the right side, ID 16 as head, and IDs 25-32 as the left side.
Only enabled joint pairs are modified by the gait generator. Disabled/fixed servos keep their standing pulse from group 0.
If a joint moves in the wrong physical direction, flip its right_sign or left_sign between 1 and -1.
The first version is conservative. Tune amplitude_deg only after checking servo directions one by one.

joint_pairs.description: Lateral weight shift. If robot leans wrong way, flip both signs.
Forward/back leg swing. Inferred from original XML: right 2 and left 30 decrease during swing.
Knee bend during swing. Inferred from original XML: right 3 and left 31 increase during swing.
Foot pitch compensation. If toes dig into ground, reduce ankle_pitch_knee_gain.
Ankle/side roll compensation for body roll. Conservative amplitude to reduce fall risk.
Arm swing is disabled by default because left output 25-32 had hardware issues and ID 25 stands at 2500.
